ranked_movies.title: A Bittersweet Life
ranked_movies.reason: The central film of the main discussion thread. Universally acclaimed and highly recommended as a stylish, gritty, and masterful crime/revenge film. Described as 'proto John Wick with more class' and a must-watch for the genre.

ranked_movies.title: The Yellow Sea
ranked_movies.reason: The subject of its own dedicated thread. Heavily praised for its brutal action, gripping story, and incredible chase scenes. Frequently compared to the director's other work and considered a top-tier Korean crime thriller.

ranked_movies.title: Memories of Murder
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a well-known benchmark for quality. Its acclaim is used to highlight how other films flew under the radar, indicating its high status and widespread recognition among fans.

ranked_movies.title: I Saw the Devil
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as part of a director's standout filmography. Known for its intense and brutal narrative, it is consistently brought up as a hallmark of top-tier Korean thriller filmmaking.

ranked_movies.title: Oldboy
ranked_movies.reason: Listed by a user as one of the Korean films they've seen and loved. Its inclusion, even briefly, signifies its enduring status as a canonical and essential film that fans are expected to have seen.

ranked_movies.title: The Chaser
ranked_movies.reason: Explicitly mentioned as the director's previous, arguably better film that involved the same lead actors as 'The Yellow Sea'. It is held in very high regard as a brutal and effective thriller.

ranked_movies.title: The Wailing
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as another film by the director of 'The Chaser'. Described as an excellent horror film and a favorite, indicating its high standing within the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Parasite
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned by a user as one of the Korean films they've seen. Its inclusion, even in a list, confirms its inescapable popularity and status as a modern classic that defines Korean cinema for many.

ranked_movies.title: Failan
ranked_movies.reason: Repeatedly recommended as an underrated and powerful drama. Its poignant story and strong performances were highlighted as reasons it deserves more attention.

ranked_movies.title: Castaway on the Moon
ranked_movies.reason: The top-voted comment in the first thread. Described as an 'incredible movie' that is unique, securing its place as a highly beloved and recommended film.

ranked_movies.title: A Tale of Two Sisters
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as part of a celebrated director's filmography. It is a well-regarded classic in the horror genre and is used to exemplify the director's peak work.

ranked_movies.title: Train to Busan
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned by a user as one of the Korean films they've seen and loved. Its popularity as a breakout zombie film ensures its place among the most discussed movies.

ranked_movies.title: Save the Green Planet!
ranked_movies.reason: Strongly recommended as a film that 'deserves a lot more love'. Described as wild, insane, and awesome, generating significant enthusiasm in the comments.

ranked_movies.title: A Taxi Driver
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times. Based on a true story, it is held in high esteem for its historical and dramatic weight.

ranked_movies.title: Sympathy for Mr. Vengeance
ranked_movies.reason: Listed alongside 'Oldboy' by a user. As part of the renowned Vengeance Trilogy, its mention signifies its importance within the context of celebrated Korean cinema.

ranked_movies.title: Asura: The City of Madness
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times in both main threads. Described as a gritty and underrated crime movie, indicating a strong cult following.

ranked_movies.title: The Good, The Bad, The Weird
ranked_movies.reason: Included in a list of a director's best works. Known for its stylish and energetic take on the western genre, it is a frequently cited favorite.

ranked_movies.title: 1987: When the Day Comes
ranked_movies.reason: Listed in a detailed comment of recommended films across genres. Its inclusion suggests it is a top-tier political/historical drama.

ranked_movies.title: Bedevilled
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a powerful and underappreciated film. Its mention suggests it has a strong impact on those who have seen it.

ranked_movies.title: Poongsan
ranked_movies.reason: Received a long, passionate recommendation for its powerful depiction of divided Koreas and incredible lead performance, marking it as a hidden gem.
